basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Madurai Project Technical Support II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Madurai (AIIMS Madurai)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Madurai (AIIMS Madurai) Project Technical Support II Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of AIIMS Madurai. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Madurai Project Technical Support II Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum age limit for Project Technical Support II is 30 years. Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: 12th in Science + Diploma (MLT/DMLT) + 5 Years Experience OR Graduate degree
qualification.details: Project Technical Support II: 12th in Science + Diploma (MLT/DMLT) + Five Years Experience in relevant subject/field. Three Years Graduate degree in Science – B.Sc. (public health, medical social work, nursing, MLT, sociology, psychology, pharmacology, nutrition and dietetics, biochemistry, microbiology, allied health sciences, chemistry, physics, statistics) + two years' experience in relevant subject or postgraduation in the above fields. | Experience: 5 years (for Diploma holders) or 2 years (for Graduate/Postgraduate holders) in relevant subject/field. Previous experience in similar field/community-based projects/health system related research projects is desirable. Ability to speak, read and write in Tamil is desirable.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs 20000 per month with HRA (18%) = Rs 24000 p.m.
salary_details.details: Rs 20000 per month with HRA (18%) = Rs 24000 p.m.

selection_process: Preliminary assessment (written exam and hands on exercise) Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Madurai Project Technical Support II Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Madurai to complete the application.
